title: IEA countries to meet later Tuesday on release of oil reserves, but no decision made yet
summary_full: The IEA's members are advanced economies in North America, Europe and Northeast Asia. They collectively hold about 1.2 billion barrels of oil in reserve.
summary_public: The IEA's members are advanced economies in North America, Europe and Northeast Asia. They collectively hold about 1.2 billion barrels of oil in reserve.
